output: Executed the batch-5 verification stack. `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` confirmed `ClipAction.test.tsx` passes and the targeted pinned-shot-group resize cases in `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` pass; the only focused failure remains the known pre-existing `data-shot-group-kind='pinned'` assertion. `npx tsc --noEmit` passed. Per the batch rule, `npx vitest run` was rerun and continued surfacing the same broad unrelated pre-existing workspace failures seen in earlier batches, so the full suite is still not green for reasons outside this scoped video-editor work. A throwaway verifier script was created under `/tmp`, run successfully, and deleted; it re-ran the focused modules, asserted the targeted resize/menu behaviors, and printed the manual in-product smoke steps. The manual browser smoke itself, including the single-undo confirmation, was not executed in this CLI-only environment.
